subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who is established upon the Throne and hath summoned all to the recognition of the Dawning-Place of His Cause in such wise that naught hath deterred Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی استقر علی العرش و دعا الکل الی عرفان مطلع امره علی شان مامنعته
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
